metadata.design_intent: 3-lane marketplace (main bazaar + two side service halls) for 10 players (5v5) FPS.

main_bazaar_lane.notes: Shops/props confined to stall strips and marked prop pockets. Keep center 6.0m continuously navigable.

west_side_hall.notes: Widened to 6.5m total / 4.5m clear. Feels like a real service alley; room for wall-side goods stacks.

east_side_hall.notes: Widened to 6.5m total / 4.5m clear. Mirror of west hall with slightly lighter dressing.

zones.label: Spawn A — Courtyard
zones.notes: Spawn safety cover + quick access to all lanes via bazaar center and side connectors.

zones.label: Spawn B — Gate Plaza
zones.notes: Spawn safety cover + landmark arch threshold into bazaar.

zones.label: Bazaar Main — BZ-M1 (Spice Market)
zones.notes: Dense spice-market character. Stall strips on edges. Clusters near entry, open node near mid cut.

zones.label: Bazaar Main — BZ-M2 (Fabric & Textile JOG)
zones.notes: Wider stalls, fewer count. Jog +2.0m East breaks LoS. Asymmetric left/right stall count. Well node at Y=41.

zones.label: Bazaar Main — BZ-M3 (Rug & Craft, approaching Arch)
zones.notes: Sparse at south, denser approaching arch. Hero arch zone (Y=65-68) has no stalls. One diagonal stall near north cut.

zones.label: West Side Hall (Widened)
zones.notes: 6.5m total / 4.5m clear. Goods stacks against outer wall. Heavier dressing than east hall. Service character.

zones.label: East Side Hall (Widened)
zones.notes: 6.5m total / 4.5m clear. Lighter dressing than west hall. Service character.

zones.label: Spawn A ↔ West Hall Connector
zones.notes: Widened to match hall expansion. Short connector; maintain quick flank access.

zones.label: Spawn A ↔ East Hall Connector
zones.notes: Widened to match hall expansion. Short connector; maintain quick flank access.

zones.label: Spawn B ↔ West Hall Connector
zones.notes: Widened to match hall expansion. Short connector; maintain quick flank access.

zones.label: Spawn B ↔ East Hall Connector
zones.notes: Widened to match hall expansion. Short connector; maintain quick flank access.

zones.label: Mid Cut (West)
zones.notes: Extended to reach widened west hall inner edge at x=8.0.

zones.label: Mid Cut (East)
zones.notes: Extended to reach widened east hall inner edge at x=42.0.

zones.notes: Extended to reach widened west hall inner edge at x=8.0.

zones.label: North Cut (East)
zones.notes: Extended to reach widened east hall inner edge at x=42.0.

exterior_wall_patches._note: West recess exterior face: BZ_M2_JOG steps back 2.5m creating a non-walkable pocket (X=20.25-22.75, Z=32-50). Both sides of X=20.25 are non-walkable so no wall is generated. This patch injects the missing 9m exterior wall segment directly — without making the pocket walkable (which would remove the jog walls at X=22.75).

East void south face: BZ_M2_JOG protrudes 1.5m beyond BZ_M1, creating non-walkable void at X=29.75-31.25, Z=14-32. X=31.25 east face has no wall here. Merges with the existing X=31.25, Z=32-50 segment to form a continuous east exterior wall.
East void north face: symmetric to south — X=29.75-31.25, Z=50-68 is non-walkable. Together the three patches produce a continuous 9m slab at X=31.25, Z=14-68.

constraints.no_block_zone: Clear travel zones must remain unobstructed by props/shops. Temporary gameplay items only (e.g., pickups) allowed if they do not block.
